title: Haptic Feedback VR Glove
description: Senior capstone project featuring a VR glove with real-time haptic and thermal feedback. Built BLE firmware on dual ESP32-S3 microcontrollers with bidirectional communication, automatic reconnection, and a custom multi-command packet parser to control 10 vibration motors and 2 Peltier thermal tiles synced with Unity.

title: Autonomous Oxygen Management System
description: 1st Place winner at IEEE ProfHackathon (Track 3: Outlaws & Automation). A Python-controlled PLC simulating a space habitat oxygen tank that autonomously responds to demand fluctuations using a real-time Serial/Modbus control loop to adjust motor output via Variable Frequency Drive.

title: RAG API with Automated Quality Testing
description: A FastAPI REST API implementing Retrieval-Augmented Generation — queries ChromaDB for nearest-neighbor context retrieval, augments prompts, and generates responses via a local Ollama (tinyllama) LLM. Includes a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline running automated semantic regression tests on every push.
